articles.title: Bicyclist, 74, killed in collision with dump truck in Dartmouth, DA says
articles.description:
The truck driver remained "cooperative with police," officials said.

The post Bicyclist, 74, killed in collision with dump truck in Dartmouth, DA says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A 74-year-old bicyclist was killed in a collision with a dump truck in Dartmouth.
The truck driver is cooperating with police investigations following the incident.
This tragedy raises concerns about cyclist safety on local roads in Boston.

articles.title: Boston man charged after allegedly assaulting Burger King employee, punching customer
articles.description:
The customer, who was evaluated for “visible lacerations to the forehead,” was punched three times while being called racial slurs, prosecutors say.

The post Boston man charged after allegedly assaulting Burger King employee, punching customer appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston man charged for assaulting a Burger King employee and a customer on July 13.
Customer suffered visible lacerations after being punched three times and facing racial slurs.
Incident raises concerns about safety and racial tensions in local fast-food establishments.
